title: Is ANTIGRAVITY Being Hidden From Us?
summary: This interview segment discusses the possibility of anti-gravity technology being secretly developed by aerospace corporations. The guest expresses skepticism that fundamental physics discoveries could be kept secret from the broader scientific community.

key_claims.claim: If anti-gravity craft are being built by aerospace corporations, new physics would have to be involved
There is no evidence that fundamental physics knowledge is being housed in aerospace companies and kept secret from the physics community
If fundamental physics had been kept secret since humanity became capable of exploding fusion devices, it would change our entire concept of who we are
